data.title: Economist: AI spending boom reshaping U.S. economy
data.description: The message to B2B ecommerce executives was clear: AI is creating a structural shift in how corporations allocate resources and how the economy grows.

data.title: Target to launch app in OpenAI's ChatGPT
data.description: Target said it will offer "a complete shopping experience" through its ChatGPT app. The app will allow consumers to purchase multiple items in a single transaction, shop for fresh food and select omnichannel fulfillment options including drive up and pick up.

data.title: Perplexity's agentic commerce experience to expand to free users
data.description: The AI search platform plans to roll new agentic commerce features out widely for Perplexity users ahead of Thanksgiving.

data.title: Intel names its next CIO to lead digital transformation
data.description: Cindy Stoddard will report directly to CEO Lip-Bu Tan and lead Intel’s global IT organization, which is central to the company’s efforts to modernize legacy systems, improve data integration, and strengthen the technology backbone supporting Intel’s semiconductor, software, and AI initiatives.

data.title: Kroger to expand partnerships in updated ecommerce fulfillment plan
data.description: Kroger said its "hybrid ecommerce offerings" will accelerate its online sales growth. It will use its growing number of stores and its established third-party delivery partners, as well as automated fulfillment facilities.
